prompt: Create a realistic vertical smartphone photo of a young Japanese woman in a cozy sunlit café, shot as an intimate close-up selfie from slightly above table height. The woman has shoulder-length straight dark brown hair with a natural center part and soft layered ends, wearing a cream white knit sweater, seated at a wooden table and holding a beige ceramic coffee cup near the lower left foreground. Her face is completely covered by a large centered opaque square censor block in a warm brown skin-tone color, hiding all facial features while leaving her hair, neck, sweater, and hands visible. On the table are exactly 3 visible items: one ceramic coffee cup in her hand, one iced coffee glass with a straw in the background left, and one small pastry on a white plate behind her hand. The café background includes large windows on the left, warm sunlight, wooden tables, a blurred seated woman in the far-left background, shelves on the right with many jars, and green potted plants. Use natural daylight, realistic Japanese café atmosphere, shallow depth of field, high-detail hair texture, soft highlights, candid smartphone framing, no beauty-filter look, no text overlays, no watermark. Camera style: realistic iPhone photo, 35mm equivalent, f/1.8, warm natural light.
